lines.english: Bai Ying'ai, what day of the week is September 12th?
Really? How old are you this year?
I'll treat you to a meal on Thursday, how about that?
That's great! Thank you, thank you.
Do you like Chinese food or American food?
I am British, but I like Chinese food.

vocabulary.definition: (measure word for position in a numerical series, day of the month)

example_sentence.cn: 我星期四请你吃饭, 怎么样?
example_sentence.py: Wǒ xīngqìsì qǐng nǐ chī fàn, zěnmeyàng?
example_sentence.en: I'll treat you to dinner on Thursday. How does that sound?

example_sentence.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example_sentence.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

example_sentence.py: Nà tiān shì wǒ de shēngrì.

vocabulary.definition: to give birth to, to be born

example_sentence.cn: 二〇一九年八月十二日晚上七点
example_sentence.py: èr líng yī jiǔ nián bāyuè shí'èr rì wǎnshang qī diǎn

example_sentence.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example_sentence.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.
I will treat you to dinner

vocabulary.definition: Is it OK? How is that? How does that sound?

example_sentence.cn: 今天晚上我请你和你妹妹吃美国菜，怎么样？
example_sentence.py: Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒ qǐng nǐ hé nǐ mèimei chī Měiguó cài, zěnmeyàng?
example_sentence.en: I'll treat you and your younger sister to American food tonight. How about it?

example_sentence.cn: 他(是)喜欢吃中国菜还是喜欢吃美国菜?
example_sentence.py: Tā (shì) xǐhuan chī Zhōngguó cài háishi xǐhuan chī Měiguó cài?
example_sentence.en: Does he like to eat Chinese or American food?

example_sentence.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example_sentence.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

example_sentence.cn: 你哥哥是老师还是学生?
example_sentence.py: Nǐ gēge shì lǎoshī háishi xuésheng?
example_sentence.en: Is your older brother a teacher or a student?

vocabulary.definition: o'clock (lit. dot, point, thus "points on the clock")

video_global_config.visual_style: A vibrant and friendly 3D animation style, reminiscent of modern Pixar films, with soft lighting and expressive characters. The setting is a bright, clean university campus coffee shop.

character_definitions.name: 高文中
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: Gao Wenzhong is an 18-year-old Chinese male university student. He has short, neat black hair, friendly dark brown eyes, and a warm smile. He wears a casual blue hoodie and jeans. He appears enthusiastic and kind.

character_definitions.name: 白英爱
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: Bai Ying'ai is an 18-year-old British female university student. She has shoulder-length wavy blonde hair, bright blue eyes, and a curious, expressive face. She wears a stylish yellow sweater and a plaid skirt. She looks cheerful and engaging.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中和白英爱坐在大学咖啡馆里。高文中看着手机上的日历，好奇地问白英爱一个关于日期的问题。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. A young Chinese male student (Gao Wenzhong) and a young British female student (Bai Ying'ai) are sitting at a small table in a bright, modern university coffee shop. Sunlight streams through the window. Gao Wenzhong holds a smartphone, displaying a calendar app showing 'September'. He looks thoughtfully at Bai Ying'ai, about to ask a question. Close-up shot, shallow depth of field.

voice_over.content: 白英爱, 九月十二号是星期几?
voice_over.pinyin: Bái Yīng'ài, jiǔyuè shí'èr hào shì xīngqī jǐ?

screen_overlay.sub_text: What day of the week is September 12th?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 白英爱回答后，高文中开心地宣布那天是他的生日。他脸上带着期待的微笑。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Medium shot of Gao Wenzhong and Bai Ying'ai at the coffee shop table. Gao Wenzhong smiles warmly, a happy realization dawning on his face. A small, subtle animated birthday cake icon briefly appears in a thought bubble above his head. Bai Ying'ai looks at him with a curious expression. The background is softly blurred.

voice_over.pinyin: Nà tiān shì wǒ de shēngrì.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中做出邀请的手势，热情地提议星期四请白英爱吃饭。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Over-the-shoulder shot from behind Bai Ying'ai, looking at Gao Wenzhong. He leans forward slightly with an inviting gesture, a friendly and hopeful expression on his face. The coffee shop environment is warm and inviting. The focus is on his expressive face and gesture.

voice_over.content: 我星期四请你吃饭, 怎么样?
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ xīngqīsì qǐng nǐ chīfàn, zěnmeyàng?

screen_overlay.sub_text: to treat you to a meal

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 画面中出现分割，一边是精美的中国菜，另一边是典型的美国菜。高文中向白英爱提问。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Creative split-screen effect. On the left, a vibrant, steaming plate of Chinese dumplings and Peking duck. On the right, a juicy American cheeseburger and golden fries. In the center, Gao Wenzhong looks at Bai Ying'ai, who is pondering her choice with a thoughtful expression. The transition to the split screen is a smooth, animated wipe.

voice_over.content: 你喜欢吃中国菜还是美国菜?
voice_over.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuan chī Zhōngguó cài háishì Měiguó cài?

screen_overlay.main_text: 中国菜 (Zhōngguó cài) 还是 (háishì) 美国菜 (Měiguó cài)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 白英爱兴奋地选择了中国菜。高文中微笑着，一个动画时钟出现在他们之间，指针指向七点半。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Medium shot of the two students. Bai Ying'ai nods enthusiastically. An animated clock face materializes between them, with the hands spinning and stopping at 7:30. Gao Wenzhong points to the clock with a questioning look. The lighting is warm and cozy.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 两人愉快地达成一致。他们互相挥手告别，脸上都洋溢着期待的笑容。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Wide shot of the coffee shop. Gao Wenzhong and Bai Ying'ai stand up from their table, smiling and waving goodbye to each other. The scene is filled with a sense of happy anticipation. The camera slowly pulls back, showing the warm, friendly atmosphere of the entire cafe. Lens flare from the window.

screen_overlay.main_text: 星期四晚上见 (Xīngqīsì wǎnshang jiàn)
